name: Varunprasaath R. Selvaraju, Ph.D.
summary: PhD Chemist with 6+ years of experience in spectroscopy, chemometrics, and analytical method development. Expertise in FT-IR, UV-Vis-NIR spectroscopy, and spectroelectrochemistry for materials characterization and process monitoring. Strong background in developing multivariate analysis methods, calibration models, and applying statistical techniques to spectral data. Experienced in quantitative spectroscopic analysis and establishing structure-property correlations using advanced data analysis approaches.

education.details: Dissertation: Modular Design and Electrochemical Properties of Xanthene-Based Electrochromic Materials

education.degree: B.S. (Research), Major: Chemistry; Minor: Materials Science

bullets: Conducted extensive spectroscopic analysis using FT-IR, UV-Vis-NIR, and spectroelectrochemistry for materials characterization.
Developed quantitative relationships between spectral features and electrochemical properties using statistical analysis.
Applied chemometric approaches to analyze complex spectral data and establish calibration models.
Develop spectroscopic methods for process monitoring and quality assessment of polymer systems.

skills.Data Analysis: Multivariate analysis, statistical analysis, DOE, JMP, chemometrics concepts
skills.Analytical Methods: Method development, calibration, process monitoring, materials characterization

projects.title: Bio-based Polymer Process Development
projects.description: Led chemical process development for novel bio-based polymer systems using statistical experimental design.

projects.title: AFOSR Defense Coatings Program
projects.description: Co-led process development for high-performance molecular thin-film coatings for defense optical applications.

publications: Ramasamy Selvaraju, V.; Venta, R.; Rajapaksha, I.; Zhang, J.; Barlow, S.; Salman, S.; Scott, C.; Marder, S. "Narrow-Band Electrochromism of a Ferrocene-Substituted Rhodamine B." Chemistry of Materials, 2025, 37, 5558–5568.

Mandal, J.; Ramasamy Selvaraju, V.; Yan, W.; Divandari, M.; Spencer, N. D.; Dubner, M. "In Situ Monitoring of SI-ATRP Throughout Multiple Reinitiations Under Flow by Means of a Quartz Crystal Microbalance." RSC Advances, 2018, 8, 20048–20055.
